segmented-basic-pills.title: Pills variant for compact view switching
segmented-basic-pills.description: The basic happy-path for `GrSegmented`: a light pills control with a moving indicator and single-value selection.

segmented-button-variant.title: Button variant with runtime size control
segmented-button-variant.description: The button-like mode suits toolbar and view-switcher scenarios but keeps the shared segmented UX and indicator animation.

segmented-custom-content.title: Icon + label and icon-only content
segmented-custom-content.description: The component can work with both `icon + label` and compact icon-only rendering through a scoped slot without bloating the API.

segmented-states.title: Disabled items, block layout and language switcher
segmented-states.description: We assemble real product-like scenarios: language pills, a full-width layout and a disabled item inside the group without losing readability.

basic.revenueSubtitle: A switcher with a soft pills backing and an animated selected track.

states.disabledNote: The disabled option stays visible and keeps the structure of the choice set.
